question: Has Kelly Clarkson outsold season 4 American Idol winner?
context: Carrie Underwood was the winner of the fourth season of American Idol.
Carrie Underwood has sold a little over 65 million albums.
Kelly Clarkson has sold a little over 25 million albums.
response:
<reasoning>
Carrie Underwood won the fourth season of American Idol.
Carrie Underwood has sold a little over 65 million albums.
Kelly Clarkson has sold a little over 25 million albums.
65 million is greater than 25 million.
Kelly Clarkson has not outsold Carrie Underwood.
Kelly Clarkson has not outsold season 4 American Idol winner.
<answer> No
claims: Carrie Underwood won the fourth season of American Idol

Kelly Clarkson has not outsold Carrie Underwood
